title: tao-vl-reason-v1.0 annotation file
description: A single tao-vl-reason-v1.0 annotation file. The file contains a flat list of training items. metadata.type is the schema discriminator (always 'annotation'); metadata.task is an optional free-form label (typically the task name when produced by the metropolis-v3.0 converter). question, answer, and reasoning are free-form strings — the format does not impose per-task structure.

type.description: Schema discriminator. Always 'annotation' for tao-vl-reason-v1.0 annotation files.

task.description: Optional free-form label for the items in this file. Encouraged to be meaningful — the metropolis-v3.0 converter writes the source task name here (e.g. 'bcq', 'mcq', 'open_qa').

media_root.description: Root for resolving each item's video_id / image_id. null → resolve relative to the dataset root. A relative string → resolved as a subdirectory under the dataset root. An absolute path → used as-is (useful for shared media stores).

video_id.description: Path to the video file relative to media_root (or to the dataset root if media_root is null).

image_id.description: Path to the image file relative to media_root (or to the dataset root if media_root is null).

question.description: Free-form prompt presented to the model. May embed task-specific framing (multiple-choice options, format instructions, etc.) directly.
